title: Fix TaskSequenceGoal decomposition crash (no decomposer registered)
description:
## Problem
`TaskSequenceGoal` wraps inner goals (e.g., `PlaceBlockGoal`) but had no decomposer registered. `PlannerRouter.Select` fell through to `HtnPlanner` which couldn't decompose it → threw `InvalidOperationException`.

From live logs:
```
[goal] set: Sequence:PlaceBlock:dirt - Step 1/4: Place 4x dirt in front
Planning failed for goal 'Sequence:PlaceBlock:dirt'.
System.InvalidOperationException: HtnPlanner could not decompose goal 'Sequence:PlaceBlock:dirt' (phases: [place]). No matching task methods found.
```

## Fix
Created `TaskSequenceGoalDecomposer` that delegates to the `DecomposerRegistry` for the current step's goal type. Registered in `DecomposerRegistry` (in `Program.cs`).

## Files
- `Agent.Planning/Decomposition/TaskSequenceGoalDecomposer.cs` — new
- `WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs` — registration

## Validation
- `dotnet build` — 0 warnings
- `dotnet test` — 746/746 passed
